name: Agently
description: [GenAI Application Development Framework]  🚀 Build GenAI application quick and easy 💬 Easy to interact with GenAI agent in code using structure data and chained-calls syntax 🧩 Use Event-Driven Flow *TriggerFlow* to manage complex GenAI working logic 🔀 Switch to any model without rewrite application code
summaryZh: [GenAI Application Development Framework]  🚀 Build GenAI application quick and easy 💬 Easy to interact with GenAI agent in code using structure data and chained-calls syntax 🧩 Use Event-Driven Flow *TriggerFlow* to manage complex GenAI working logic 🔀 Switch to any model without rewrite application code 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
